category_sources: source_facts.description says "Super powered replacement for GNU Stow"; official Tuckr docs describe it as a dotfile manager and symlink farm.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is "tuckr"; official documentation title is "Tuckr Documentation" and GitHub repo is RaphGL/Tuckr.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to "Explore the docs" at raphgl.github.io; the page is titled Tuckr Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tursodatabase/turso; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an interactive SQL shell; official README describes Turso Database as an in-process SQL database compatible with SQLite.
